name: Rayna Table Lamp - 19 Inch Height - TBL4471 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with modern sophistication using the rayna 19.5 inch black iron table lamp. With its sleek design and bold black finish, this lamp adds a touch of elegance to any decor. The iron construction provides a timeless look that seamlessly blends with a variety of styles. Perfect for your living room, bedroom, or office, rayna delivers a subtle yet striking accent to your environment. The structure of the lamp ensures it stands securely, making it both a practical and stylish addition. Brighten up your surroundings with rayna where functional design meets contemporary flair. Add this distinctive piece to your collection and transform the ambiance of your space.
